overall.description: First-person walk through a rainy neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The character walks along wet sidewalks, crosses a large intersection, and continues through streets lined with towering buildings covered in holographic advertisements and glowing signage. Game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk next to busy street with orange commercial building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk next to a busy street, passing pedestrians and observing the neon-lit cityscape

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk
cars driving along the wet street with headlights reflecting on the pavement

entered.detail: tall building with orange and red facade and horizontal neon strips
orange metal railing separating sidewalk from street
rain-slicked concrete pavement reflecting neon lights
various illuminated signs and advertisements on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wet sidewalk beside a busy downtown street, with an orange commercial building on the left and traffic barriers separating the pedestrian path from the road. The rain creates reflective surfaces that mirror the neon lights from surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection crosswalk with yellow striped markings

events.description: steps off sidewalk and onto the crosswalk to cross the wide intersection
looks up at the towering skyscrapers while standing in the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection on the crosswalk, surrounded by the openness of the downtown area and towering buildings

notable_agents.action: pedestrians crossing the street in the same direction toward the kabayan foods building

entered.detail: large red neon sign for 'kabayan foods' on building facade
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
towering glass and steel buildings reaching into the night sky
large illuminated advertising screen on building

segments.scene_description: Having left the covered sidewalk, the scene opens into a wide intersection with yellow crosswalk markings. The kabayan foods sign glows red in the distance while skyscrapers tower overhead. The camera crosses the wet asphalt and pauses to look up at the immense buildings before continuing.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along street with prominent purple neon building

events.description: finishes crossing and steps onto the sidewalk on the opposite side of the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking along the new sidewalk, passing by pedestrians and observing the futuristic purple-lit building facade on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with distinctive red hair walking past the camera

entered.detail: futuristic building with prominent purple neon lighting and curved metallic architecture
giant screen displaying advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: Now on the opposite side of the intersection, the walk continues along a sidewalk dominated by a striking purple neon building on the right. Large digital billboards illuminate the left side while pedestrians walk in both directions along the rain-soaked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with multiple digital billboards

agents.ego_description: continuing along the neon-lit street, passing groups of pedestrians and various storefronts with intense purple and blue lighting

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians gathered near a building entrance

entered.detail: building facade covered in multiple large digital advertising screens showing various content

segments.scene_description: The walk continues deeper into the downtown area, with a massive wall of digital screens on the left displaying advertisements. The purple neon building remains visible in the background while the street remains busy with pedestrians and traffic moving through the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-slicked cyberpunk downtown, moving from a narrow pedestrian corridor into a vast, neon-drenched urban intersection. It begins along a wet sidewalk beside an orange commercial building, where traffic barriers separate the path from a road reflecting the surrounding city lights. As the camera leaves the covered walkway, the scene opens into a wide intersection with yellow crosswalks, pausing briefly to look up at towering skyscrapers and a glowing red Kabayan Foods sign. The movement then shifts across the wet asphalt to the opposite sidewalk, where the environment is dominated by a striking purple neon building and large digital billboards. Finally, the walk continues deeper into the city center, passing a massive wall of digital screens that illuminate the busy street and the steady flow of pedestrians under the rainy night sky.
